name: AWS Certified Developer – Associate (DVA-C02)
description: Associate-level certification for developers building and maintaining AWS applications. Validates proficiency in developing, deploying, and debugging cloud-based applications. 1+ years hands-on experience. 65 questions, 130 minutes, 720/1000 passing score.

domains.name: Development with AWS Services
domains.description: Domain 1 (32%): Develop code for applications hosted on AWS (Lambda, API Gateway, SDKs, CLI). Develop code for AWS services integration.

domains.name: Security
domains.description: Domain 2 (26%): Implement authentication/authorization (Cognito, IAM), implement encryption using AWS services, manage sensitive data.

domains.name: Deployment
domains.description: Domain 3 (24%): Prepare application artifacts, test applications in development environments, automate deployment testing, deploy code using CI/CD (CodePipeline, CodeBuild, CodeDeploy).

domains.name: Troubleshooting and Optimization
domains.description: Domain 4 (18%): Assist in root cause analysis, instrument code for observability (CloudWatch, X-Ray), optimize applications.
